tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Workshop overview, prerequisites, and lab sequence.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Install and Configure Codex
tutorials.description: Install Codex, choose a workspace, apply config.toml, and restart Codex.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Install and Test Codex Skills
tutorials.description: Install skills from the shared Oracle bundle and confirm Codex can load them.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Generate and Run a LiveStack Demo
tutorials.description: Use LiveStacks Orchestrator and Podman Compose to generate and run a local demo, or run a supplied solution zip on OCI Compute.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Template to link to Need Help lab at the end of workshop.
